overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city alley in Cyberpunk 2077 during golden hour. The camera moves past abandoned vehicles and debris toward an overpass, with neon signs and holographic billboards visible on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk back alley with neon signage

events.description: camera begins moving forward from initial stationary position
intense sun flare diminishes as camera advances down the alley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet asphalt alley toward the distant overpass, passing industrial walls with graffiti

entered.detail: tall building with holographic advertisements and red neon signage reflecting off the wet ground
elevated highway overpass spanning the width of the alley ahead
red convertible sports car parked on the right side of the alley
industrial concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and exposed piping

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk alley during golden hour, with intense sun flare ahead. The camera moves forward past a graffiti-covered industrial wall on the left and an abandoned red sports car on the right, heading toward a concrete overpass in the distance. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the building facades.

events.description: cardboard boxes and blue trash bags become visible scattered on the ground
camera turns slightly left while maintaining forward progress

agents.ego_description: navigating through scattered debris while approaching distant figures under the overpass

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking beneath the overpass ahead

entered.detail: scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the wet asphalt
blue garbage bags piled against the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving through the mid-section of the alley, the camera passes the abandoned red car and encounters cardboard debris and trash bags scattered across the wet ground. The neon building remains prominent on the left while distant NPCs become visible walking under the approaching overpass. The lighting softens as the camera moves out of the direct sun glare.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the overpass structure ahead
abandoned blue van temporarily blocks the left side of the frame as camera passes

agents.ego_description: passing the abandoned blue van on the left while moving into the shadowed underpass area

entered.detail: rusted blue delivery van with open side doors and missing windows
thick concrete pillars supporting the highway deck above

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters the shadow of the overpass, passing an abandoned blue van on the left. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as concrete support pillars dominate the view. The neon building fades into the background left while the camera moves through the cluttered underpass area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sun-drenched cyberpunk alley that gradually descends into the dim shadows of a concrete overpass. It begins by pushing through intense golden hour sun flare, passing a graffiti-covered industrial wall and an abandoned red sports car beneath glowing neon signs and holographic billboards. As the camera moves further into the alley, the direct glare softens and the ground becomes cluttered with cardboard debris and trash bags, while distant pedestrians appear ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera enters the heavy shadow of the overpass, passing an abandoned blue van on the left. Finally, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the neon lights fade and massive concrete support pillars dominate the view.
